---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do? What's currently in your way? Describe the situation in user-level terms — the agent, the workflow, the friction.

## Proposed solution

Your best guess at what DRIP should do. Be specific: command name, flag, behaviour, output. A rough sketch is fine; we'll iterate.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is the right fit. If you considered "do nothing," say what makes that unsatisfying.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, screenshots, transcripts. Anything that frames the problem.
